audit_items.proof_trace: The rounding-up chain (mulDivUp → mulWadUp → mulDivUp) guarantees result ≥ 1 when amountIn ≥ 1, assetInUsdPrice ≥ 1, and priceMultiplier ≥ 1. In bid(), amountIn > 0 is ensured by the minBidUsdValue guard (line 433), priceMultiplier ≥ i_minPriceMultiplier ≥ 1 is enforced at construction and in _applyAssetParamsUpdates (line 650), and prices are validated non-zero via withValidation=true. The public view getAssetOutAmount returns 0 for edge inputs (amount=0 or depleted balance), but this is explicitly documented behaviour and not reachable through bid().
